logs.message: BlobManagement.Api depends on OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Http (>= 1.10.1) but OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Http 1.10.1 was not found. OpenTelemetry.Instrumentation.Http 1.11.0 was resolved instead.
Package 'OpenTelemetry.Exporter.OpenTelemetryProtocol' 1.10.0 has a known moderate severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4625-4j76-fww9
